stimulus: Program and read back a blank board
acceptance: Critical enables remain off and image identity is verified

stimulus: Program and read back a blank board
acceptance: Maker power stays off and exported I/O remains high impedance

stimulus: Cold boot with every source absent
acceptance: All controlled outputs remain passive through initialization

stimulus: Assert NRST with each source path active
acceptance: Every path and load turns off before firmware revalidation

stimulus: Stop watchdog service with each source active
acceptance: Reset starts passive with no automatic source reconnect

stimulus: Ramp MCU_3V3 through the brownout region
acceptance: No partial enable or uncontrolled reconnect occurs

stimulus: Reset with each service-mux channel selected
acceptance: The mux returns to channel zero and the upstream bus recovers

stimulus: Hold SCL and then SDA low during source validation
acceptance: Transactions remain bounded and no source path enables

stimulus: Request PD1 at 15 V 3 A
acceptance: Only PD1 bootstraps; after path-good IINDPM 2750 mA is read back before charging or loads enable

stimulus: Request PD2 at 15 V 2 A
acceptance: Only PD2 bootstraps; after path-good IINDPM 1750 mA is read back before charging or loads enable

stimulus: Request PD3 at 15 V 500 mA
acceptance: Only PD3 bootstraps; after path-good IINDPM 250 mA is read back before charging or loads enable

stimulus: Cold-start from each valid PD input with battery absent
acceptance: One qualified path powers BQ25798 first; IINDPM readback follows path-good and all downstream loads remain off until complete

stimulus: Attach a USB-C source offering only default 5 V with battery absent
acceptance: CH224A remains powered for negotiation but aggregate AON UVLO keeps the EC and every source path off

stimulus: Request a PD path without a valid current contract
acceptance: No path enables and validation reaches a latched fault

stimulus: Suppress the IINDPM applied acknowledgment
acceptance: Only the qualified bootstrap path may be on; charger and loads stay off and timeout returns the path off

stimulus: Report an applied IINDPM value different from the request
acceptance: The qualified bootstrap path turns off and the mismatch faults immediately before charging or loads start

stimulus: Inject a failure at every target commit stage
acceptance: A complete passive rollback is attempted and failed rollback stays unavailable

stimulus: Remove or reduce a negotiated-current contract while active
acceptance: The selected path and charger turn off and a fault latches

stimulus: Assert the active TPS26630 fault output
acceptance: All controlled paths and loads return passive

stimulus: Transfer between every pair of sources
acceptance: No path overlap occurs and all-off deadtime is at least 20 ms

stimulus: Prevent selected path-good assertion
acceptance: The path turns off by the 250 ms timeout and a fault latches

stimulus: Suppress MU_12V_PG during startup
acceptance: MU_12V turns off by the 20 ms timeout and a fault latches

stimulus: Remove MU_12V_PG after confirmation
acceptance: MU_12V and controlled loads return passive and a fault latches

stimulus: Assert charger fault while charging
acceptance: Charging and controlled outputs return passive and a fault latches

stimulus: Inject open short hot and implausible thermal inputs
acceptance: Unsafe or invalid telemetry cannot leave controlled loads enabled

stimulus: Request Mu startup under each source contract
acceptance: Host and eDP limits are acknowledged before MU_12V enable

stimulus: Sweep loads at released minimum pack voltage and impedance
acceptance: Measured Mu plus eDP power stays at or below the provisional 15 W ceiling

stimulus: Request more than the computed low-pack envelope
acceptance: Mu startup is denied and charging plus optional loads remain shed

stimulus: Suppress the host and eDP limit acknowledgment
acceptance: MU_12V remains off and the bounded apply timeout faults off

stimulus: Trip pack protection intentionally at low state of charge
acceptance: Recovery is deterministic and requires root-cause removal plus explicit retry

stimulus: Attempt fault clear before and after root-cause removal
acceptance: Premature clear is rejected and valid clear requires fresh source validation

stimulus: Cold boot and attach USB with no user load
acceptance: Maker rails stay off and all exported I/O remains high impedance

stimulus: Assert RUN with rails and GPIO active
acceptance: Rails turn off and all exported I/O returns high impedance

stimulus: Enter BOOTSEL recovery
acceptance: Maker rails stay off and exported I/O remains high impedance

stimulus: Stop maker watchdog service with outputs active
acceptance: Restart remains passive until explicit reauthorization and a new request

stimulus: Assert the maker power-switch fault
acceptance: Rails turn off and the fault remains latched until deliberate recovery

stimulus: Request rails and I/O without authorization
acceptance: The request faults off and is not queued for later activation

stimulus: Measure every exported signal during boot reset and fault
acceptance: Every signal meets released high-impedance leakage limits until configured
